title: Levelling up Kidderminster with £17.9 million funding
body: "Plans for Kidderminster  Plans for the funding include:   creation of a new walking and cycle pathway along the Staffordshire and Worcestershire Canal towpath refurbishing the Grade II listed Town Hall   Benefits for Kidderminster  The investment is expected to:   improve connections in the town make the town more accessible increase visitor numbers   The Levelling Up Fund investment complements other projects in the town funded by the Future High Streets Fund. All projects support Wyre Forest Council’s 2040 vision for Kidderminster.  Find out more about levelling up. "

taxons.title: Conservation of historic buildings and monuments
